image_caption: The rear view of a mobile crane.

A stone pit. Fractured stones are covering the hill. There are two excavators on the right on top of the hill digging the pile of stones. There are more than 10 workers with red hard hats scattered on the slope.

Five pieces of construction equipment are working on a construction site. Two excavators are digging and loading the trucks.

There are two other workers with yellow hard hats and safety vest on the right of the image. There is an unfinished concrete building at the background.

A construction site is divided into two by scaffoldings. For the closer construction site, there are piles of dimensional lumber at the left and metal rebars at the right. For the farther site, there are piles of tied and untied dimensional lumber all across the site, and stirrups at the left. at the left of the construction site, there are five rolls of coiled rebars and white blocks. There are about 13 workers with yellow or red hard hats at the site.
Two workers with yellow hard hats are applying green geotextile fabric to exposed dirt at a construction site.

right of the image, and a loader to the farther side of the construction site. On the left, there are three concrete pipes.
